overall_summary: The ElizaOS ecosystem is facing a critical trust crisis due to a 99.5% token price decline and allegations of team dumping, contrasted by a high-velocity technical phase focused on 'Agent Commerce' and security patching. A major supply chain vulnerability in the Axios package was identified and mitigated across several plugins.
key_facts: A supply chain attack was identified in Axios version 1.14.1, which pulls in the malware package plain-crypto-js version 4.2.1.
Developers pinned the Axios dependency to version 1.7.8 in plugin-autocoder and plugin-coingecko to mitigate the security risk.
ElizaOS token holders reported a 99.5% price decline, characterized by some community members as a 'death spiral' caused by paying developers in tokens.
Community members alleged that 40% of community tokens were transferred to team wallets during the token migration process.
The Orbis API marketplace reached 300 listed APIs and 13 active paid subscriptions, implementing an HTTP 402 payment protocol for autonomous agents.
A new plugin proposal for wallet reputation scoring and DeFi TVL verification was submitted to the elizaos-plugins registry.
The SAID Protocol was introduced to provide agents with cryptographic digital passports on the Solana blockchain.
GitHub activity remained active with a focus on a major database refactor (PR #6509) and parallel action execution (PR #6654).
open_questions: Why is Shaw not communicating or showing up?
Is it worth selling at these prices?
Anyone knows nice scraper that can get me mentions/URLs from Instagram Story? (ideally by URL)
Who is the responsible can I contact with him to lead this project??

new_issues_prs.author: elizaos
new_issues_prs.significance: Improves long-term system architecture and performance.

new_issues_prs.title: Parallel Action Execution
new_issues_prs.author: elizaos
new_issues_prs.significance: Allows agents to perform multiple tasks simultaneously rather than sequentially.

overall_focus.claim: Consolidating core agent autonomy features including cryptographic identity (AgentID) and decentralized payment protocols (x402).

discord_updates.summary: Severe community distress regarding token price collapse and perceived lack of leadership communication. Allegations of team dumping and focus shifting to Milady AI.
Critical alert regarding Axios supply chain attack and discussions on Instagram scraping tools and Orbis API updates.

user_feedback.feedback_summary: Community identifies poor communication from leadership (specifically Shaw) as the core project failure.
Investors are confused by channel fragmentation and lack of a central hub to see which projects are built on ElizaOS.

strategic_insights.insight: There is a massive divergence between active GitHub technical progress and token market performance, leading to a narrative void.
implications_or_questions: How can technical milestones be better linked to token utility to prevent further sell pressure?

strategic_insights.insight: The shift toward 'Agent Commerce' via x402 and Orbis represents a pivot from social bots to economic infrastructure.
implications_or_questions: Is the market currently undervaluing agent-to-agent economic infrastructure?

market_analysis.observation: Token price declined 99.5% from peak, performing poorly even during BTC/ETH/SOL market increases.
market_analysis.relevance: Creates extreme community FUD and potential 'death spiral' for developer funding.

market_analysis.observation: AI16z market cap reportedly dropped from 2B to 6M following a 10x supply increase.
market_analysis.relevance: Signals massive loss of liquidity and investor confidence.
